tasks.title: Design API schema and data models
tasks.description: Define REST API endpoints for CRUD operations on todos. Design the database schema with fields: id, title, description, completed, created_at, updated_at.
acceptance_criteria: API endpoints documented in docs/api.md with request/response examples
Database schema defined in docs/schema.md with field types and constraints

tasks.title: Define project structure and tech stack
tasks.description: Choose framework (Express + SQLite), define directory layout, establish coding conventions.
acceptance_criteria: docs/architecture.md exists with directory tree and tech decisions
Package.json created with dependencies listed

tasks.title: Design todo list UI components
tasks.description: Create wireframes for the main todo list view, add/edit forms, and filter controls.
acceptance_criteria: ASCII wireframes in docs/wireframes.md for list view, add form, edit form
Component hierarchy documented

tasks.title: Implement database layer
tasks.description: Set up SQLite database with migrations. Implement the Todo model with CRUD operations.
acceptance_criteria: src/db.ts creates SQLite connection and runs migrations
src/models/todo.ts exports create, read, update, delete functions
Database file created at data/todos.db on first run

tasks.title: Implement API routes
tasks.description: Create Express routes for all todo CRUD endpoints following the API schema.
acceptance_criteria: src/routes/todos.ts implements GET/POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints
Input validation on POST and PUT
Proper HTTP status codes (201 for create, 404 for not found)

tasks.title: Implement frontend components
tasks.description: Build React components for the todo list UI following the wireframes.
acceptance_criteria: src/components/TodoList.tsx renders list of todos
src/components/TodoForm.tsx handles add and edit
src/components/TodoFilter.tsx provides filter controls

tasks.title: Test API endpoints
tasks.description: Write integration tests for all API endpoints. Cover happy paths and error cases.
acceptance_criteria: tests/api.test.ts covers all CRUD endpoints
Tests for 404 on missing todo, 400 on invalid input
All tests pass

tasks.title: Test frontend components
tasks.description: Write unit tests for React components using Testing Library.
acceptance_criteria: tests/components.test.tsx tests render, add, edit, delete, filter
All tests pass
